description: Wave 34 Mr. Nodeley already wired both cards' frontmatter (characters: ['phyrexia']) and appears_on on the node side during creation, but neither card had a ## Connections section in its body. Filled in. Worst case of half-applied edges ever — fixing it now. Slobad sub-node call: declined. Phyrexian Ironworks is one flavor-speaker mention, not a depiction; the phyrexia.md node already documents Slobad in its caveats as a deferred sub-node candidate. Added a triage entry for tracking. The team-rocket / acerola precedent (≥1 depiction + ≥1 distinct-beat anchor) is not yet satisfied.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Wurmcoil Engine — Scars of Mirrodin design lineage]
[Scryfall: Phyrexian Ironworks oracle and flavor text]
[cards/_characters/phyrexia.md caveats section — Slobad as deferred sub-node candidate]
other_candidates_considered: Slobad, Iron Goblin sub-node — 0 depicted anchors, 1 flavor-speaker mention. Threshold not met per team-rocket / acerola precedent. Deferred to triage.
